description:
A new help-desk ticket (ID #551) requests a quick security scan of a staging server’s SSH logs.  
As the on-call IT support technician, your job is to:

1. Examine the log file located at  
   /home/user/mock_logs/auth.log  

2. Extract every line that contains the phrase “Failed password” (case-insensitive match; do not alter spacing, timestamps, or any other characters).

3. Save those exact, unmodified lines to a new file named  
   /home/user/ticket-551-failed-passwords.log  

Output/verification rules that the automated grader will apply:
• The file /home/user/ticket-551-failed-passwords.log must exist after you finish.  
• It must contain only the lines from /home/user/mock_logs/auth.log that include “Failed password” (case-insensitive).  
• The order of lines must be identical to their appearance in the source log.  
• No extra blank lines or trailing spaces are allowed.  
• The file path and filename must match exactly.  

Hint: a single grep command is sufficient, but use any one-liner you prefer as long as the final file meets the rules above.
truth:
Initial state supplied by the test harness:
Directory: /home/user/mock_logs/  (0755)
File: /home/user/mock_logs/auth.log  (0644) with the exact 6 lines below:

Jun  1 08:14:52 localhost sshd[1245]: Failed password for invalid user admin from 10.0.0.15 port 42422 ssh2
Jun  1 08:14:55 localhost sshd[1245]: Connection closed by 10.0.0.15 port 42422 [preauth]
Jun  1 08:15:02 localhost sshd[1247]: Failed password for root from 10.0.0.15 port 42423 ssh2
Jun  1 08:15:04 localhost sshd[1247]: Connection closed by 10.0.0.15 port 42423 [preauth]
Jun  1 08:16:27 localhost sshd[1251]: Accepted password for john from 10.0.0.16 port 42424 ssh2
Jun  1 08:16:30 localhost sshd[1251]: Failed password for user john from 10.0.0.16 port 42424 ssh2

Target file that must be created by the agent:
Path: /home/user/ticket-551-failed-passwords.log  (0644)
Required final contents (exactly 3 lines, in this order, newline-terminated):

Jun  1 08:14:52 localhost sshd[1245]: Failed password for invalid user admin from 10.0.0.15 port 42422 ssh2
Jun  1 08:15:02 localhost sshd[1247]: Failed password for root from 10.0.0.15 port 42423 ssh2
Jun  1 08:16:30 localhost sshd[1251]: Failed password for user john from 10.0.0.16 port 42424 ssh2
name: task_000000_f53f2abd
